title: Fence project cleanup to the managed release set
action: Implement D7 after cell 1. Project fallback cleanup may quarantine/remove only direct skill directories whose exact names are present as managed plugin skills in the validated release inventory at docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json. A missing malformed duplicate or inconsistent inventory refuses before mutation. Preserve bee-custom and every foreign file/symlink/hook. Extend the shared transaction suite with positive managed cleanup, bee-custom survival, malformed inventory, snapshot drift, and repeat-idempotency cases.

truths: Only exact managed plugin skill names derived from the validated release inventory are cleanup candidates
Missing malformed duplicate or inconsistent release ownership refuses before quarantine or deletion
Foreign hooks skills files symlinks and aliases remain untouched

artifacts.substantive: cleanup derives exact project ownership from the validated managed release inventory

key_links: Project cleanup names are intersected with plugin_skill records in the already validated release inventory before planning any removal
The same whole-run snapshot is revalidated before quarantine and deletion
prohibitions: Do not delete a project skill merely because its name starts with bee-
Do not broaden global cleanup beyond exact ownership ledger fences
Do not weaken symlink alias hook-shape or snapshot-drift refusal

trace.outcome: Fence project fallback cleanup to exact managed plugin_skill names from the validated release inventory; bee-custom and foreign dirs survive; malformed/inconsistent inventory refuses before mutation.
trace.verification_evidence: BEFORE: project cleanup quarantined ANY .{claude,agents,codex}/skills/bee-* directory by name prefix — bee-custom (project-owned) would have been deleted. AFTER: cleanup candidates are the exact directory names derived from plugin_skill records in the validated release inventory (managedSkillNames); an inventory that names zero managed skills or a non-bee managed skill refuses before any mutation; symlink/alias/hook-shape/snapshot-drift refusals preserved. Suite: 28 passed, 0 failed; onboard regression 0 failures.
trace.verify_output: plugin_distribution: 28 passed, 0 failed (exit 0). New: exact plugin_skill name derivation, bee-custom survival, no-managed-skill refusal, non-bee managed-name refusal, post-plan managed drift refusal, byte-idempotent repeat keeping bee-custom. onboard regression: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1
